**Scenario / user task**

**What would the user search for?**

**Proposed slug**
<!-- Keyword-first, no brand prefix. e.g. image-to-video, product-photo-to-video -->

**Why Pexo can deliver this**
<!-- Confirm Pexo's backend genuinely fulfills the scenario (no bait-and-switch). -->
